title: Ministerial Instructions related to other immigration programs and goals - Canada.ca
content:
## Ministerial Instructions related to other immigration programs and goals
The Immigration and Refugee Protection Act (IRPA) contains various provisions that allow the Minister to issue instructions that enable the Government of Canada to attain its immigration goals. Ministerial Instructions (MI) are typically issued for limited periods, and can include instructions that address application intake, processing, and selection, or create a pilot program.

## What are you looking for?
Type the keywords you want to search
